raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un eetwehre (Seltu) par
Selta Luktueem un Selta Et-
jes Luktueem/zik ikkurram Luk-
turim un Etjes Lukturim wai-
jaga bija. Ir par teem Sudra-
ba Luktueem zik ikkurram Luk-
turam/ un winna Etjes Luktu-
ram waijaga bija / ittin ka tas
ikkatram Lukturam peenahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winsch dewe arridsan
Seltn ar Swarru par teem Dee-
wain preekfchliktu Maisu Gal-
deem/ zik ikkatram Galdam pee-
nahze. Un Sudrabu par teem
fudraba Galdeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tibru Seltu par Dak-
tchabm/un Beekereem/ un Kan-
nahin. Un par selta Biffereem/
zik ikkurram Bifferam bija wai-
jaga. Ta patt arridsan par teem
fudraba Biffereem/ zik ikkurram
Bifferam bija waijaga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un par to Kwehpja-Al-
tari to wiſs tibru Seltu ar
Swarru. Ir weenu Ratto
Preekfch-Sihmi to seltu Kern-
bim/ ka teem bij tsplestees/ un ta
KUNGA Derribas Schkirstu
apfegt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas wiſs (fazzija Dah-
wids) irr man aprakstihts fin-
nams darrihts no ta KUNGA
Rohkas / prohtt wiſt schahs
Preekfch-Sihmes Darbt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazzija us
fawu Dehlu Salamannu: Stip-
rinajees/ un turrajs labbu Prab-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tu/ un darri to / un ne bihstees/
un ne bailojees/ jo tas Deews
KUNGS mans Deewos buhs ar
tewi / winsch tew ne pamettihs
nedg atstahs/ teekans tu wiſſu
to Darbu / kas ta KUNGA
Nammam peenahk buhsi pa-
hetdsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un raugi / fche irr to
Preesteru un Lewitu Kahrtas pre
wiſſa Deewa Namma Darba:
Un pee tew irr us wiſſadn Dar-
bu/wiſſadt Labprahtigi ar Gund-
ribu / pee wiſſadas Kalposcha-
nas/ ir tee Leelt-Kungi/ un wiſſi
Landis irr gattawi pehz tarwu
Wahrdu darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXX. Nodalla.
Leelu Krabjumu un Padohmu Dahwids fa
kraji/ ka toDeewa Nammu warre ustaisibt
1. Usrunna tohs Wirneekus un tohs Lau
dis / ka tee ar labbu Prahtu Dahwanng
dohd r. Kas arridsan noteek : 6. Peeluhd
Drewu/ un pateiz tam pascham: 10. Lee
Salamanu par Kehnisu un Zadaku pa
Preesteri fwaidiht : 22. Nomirst/ kad wiſſe-
tischetredsmits Gaddus pahr Israelu wal
dis: 26. etc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ehl fazzija tas Kel-
ninsch Dahwids us wi-
fu Drandsibu: Deew-
i irr mannu Dehlu Salamani
ween iswehlejs / kas jauns un
fihts irr/ un tatschu irr fcht-
Darbs leels/ jo tas ne irr kahd
Zilweka Pils / bet ta Deew-
KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es tad ar wiſfu paiv-
Spehku esmu fadohmajs preeksc-
manra Deewa Namnu Selt-
par Selta Rihkeem/ un Sudra-
bu par Sudraba Rihkeem/ u
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
